user_query: I'm organizing a social media contest for my company. Can you help me find top memes from the 'Reddit meme' API to create engaging posts? Also, search for comments on Reddit containing the term 'contest ideas' to get more inspiration. Additionally, retrieve the top posts by the username 'socialmediaqueen' on Reddit to gather some successful social media strategies.

TaskList.description: Fetch top memes from the Reddit meme API to create engaging posts.
Search for comments on Reddit containing the term 'contest ideas' to get additional inspiration.
Retrieve the top posts by the username 'socialmediaqueen' on Reddit to gather successful social media strategies.
